name: Outlines
description: Guarantees LLM outputs conform to a schema, regex, or grammar through structured generation — reliable JSON, function calls, and constrained decoding. By .txt (dottxt-ai). 14k+ stars, Apache-2.0.

skills.name: Constrained Decoding
skills.description: Forces token generation to follow a regex, JSON schema, or context-free grammar so output is always valid.

skills.name: Schema-Bound JSON
skills.description: Generates JSON that provably matches a Pydantic or JSON Schema definition without any post-hoc parsing.

skills.name: Grammar-Guided Output
skills.description: Constrains model output to a formal grammar for structured formats like SQL or custom domain languages.
